notes: Secondary/parallel qualitative analysis of open-ended free-text responses from a prior IRB-approved survey of 860 Microsoft developers; uses a human-in-the-loop, multi-model (GPT/Gemini/Claude) council-based reflexive thematic analysis pipeline with inter-rater reliability and majority-vote consensus to derive 22 desired AI systems and the 'bounded delegation' framework. No tool is built or benchmarked.
